naughty-squid-rice-teleculinaria.name: Naughty Squid Rice
instructions: Remove skin and seeds from tomatoes and cut them into small cubes. Clean the peppers and cut them in cubes as well.

Refogue ligeiramente a cebola e os alhos, descascados e picados, num tacho com o azeite. Acrescente as lulas, previamente lavadas, escorridas e cortadas em tiras grossas, regue com o vinho, mexa e, minutos depois, adicione o tomate.

Add the water and season with salt and pepper. When you are boiling, add the rice and peppers and let it cook in low heat for about 8 minutes (if necessary, add some more water). Retrieve the seasonings, remove from the fire, sprinkle with cilantro and chopped parsley, wrap and serve immediately.

instructions: Beat the eggs in a bowl with the mixer for 8-10 minutes.
Add the vanillas, ouzo, oil, soda and salt and continue to beat until the ingredients are homogenized.
Incorporate the flour gradually to see how long the dough will last.
Empty the dough on the counter and work with your hands until it becomes relatively tight, firm and sticks out of your fingers, sprinkled, if necessary, with some flour.
Cover it and let it rest for an hour.
Cut the dough into four pieces and spread very thinly with either the rolling machine or the pasta machine.
Sprinkle with minimum flour only when necessary, so that doubles don't become hard.
Touch the opened thin sheet on a clean tablecloth and cut each into four long pieces.

instructions: Peel and cut into pieces. Put her in a pot with cold water to cover her and his two garlic teeth.

It leads to boiling with fire and half and cooks with a half-put cover till the yucca is soft with a fine knife. Add salt and continue cooking about 5 minutes. Take the yocha out of the water and let it cool.
Cut the cabbage into very finite strips and put it in a bowl. Add tomato cut into cubes and onion. Swallow the salad with salt and oil and vinegar. Reserve.
On some banana leaves put some pieces of yucca and some pieces of jug. Cover up with the cabbage salad.
Disfruta inmediatamente.

noodles-with-chicken-legs-argiro.name: Noodles With Chicken Legs

ingredients.item: 4 chicken boots with skin and bone
1 large carrot cut into small frame or grated in thick grater
1/2 cup red dry wine n chicken broth or hot water
4 chicken boots with skin and bone
1 large carrot cut into small frame or grated in thick grater
1/2 cup red dry wine n chicken broth or hot water

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a plate pot (fresh and shallow).
In medium heat, add the boots around until the skin becomes crispy, about 8 to 10 minutes.
After we get them well we take them to a platter and cover them.
In the same vessel add the existing fat, onion and carrot.
Once the onion becomes transparent, after about 5 to 6 minutes, then add the buds and herbs again (dream leaf and thyme).
Add the wine and allow it to evaporate completely for about 4 to 5 minutes.
Then, add the chopped tomatoes and add the chicken broth or warm water to half-cover the thighs.
Cover the food and set it on medium heat for about 1 hour and 15 minutes or until the chicken softens well.
Add salt and pepper to the food.
With a clamp remove the buttocks as soon as they boil.
Continue boiling the sauce, without the lid anymore.
Remove the thighs, remove skin and bones.
With your hands, dissolve the search into small bites and add it to the sauce.
At this stage our sauce must be dense, full of aromas and perfect in taste!
Boil the pasta and after we drain them, we equalize them to dishes.
Pour them with the wonderful dense chicken sauce.

noodles-with-vegetables-and-chicken-pequ.name: Noodles With Vegetables And Chicken

ingredients.item: 180 g de tallarines (alrededor de 2 tazas colmadas)
12 aceitunas negras (aprox. 30 g), cortadas en rodajas
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra (30 ml aprox.)
30 g de queso parmesano rallado (2 cucharadas grandes)

instructions: Empezamos poniendo una olla con agua y sal al fuego. Cuando rompa a hervir, echamos los tallarines y los cocemos el tiempo que indique el paquete. Mientras tanto, nos ponemos con el resto.

We cut chicken breast into medium pieces, about the size of a bite. We have been pampering and we have golden them in a large frying pan with a tablespoon of olive oil, at medium-high heat, till they are well baked from the inside and slightly golden from the outside. We put them out and put them out.

In that same frying pan, we add a little more oil if necessary and put the pumpkin cut into thin moons and the peppers into pieces. We cook about 5-7 minutes, stirring from time to time, till they're tender but with some texture.

We scrubbed and added them to the frying pan with chicken, olives and grated cheese. We mix well so that everything will be evenly distributed. We tighten salt and pepper, put out the fire and decorate with basil leaves just before we serve.

nutty-cinnamon-and-currant-pumpkin-rolls.name: Nutty Cinnamon And Currant Pumpkin Rolls
instructions: Combine milk and 3 tablespoons butter in a microwave-safe bowl; heat in microwave until butter is just melted and milk is warmed (49°C/49 degrees C to 54°C/54 degrees C), 30 to 60 seconds.
Mix pumpkin, white sugar, and salt together in a bowl; beat in egg and yeast. Stir milk mixture into pumpkin mixture until evenly combined.

Whisk all-purpose flour and bread flour together in a bowl and divide mixture in half. Beat 1/2 the flour mixture into the pumpkin mixture on low until well mixed, about 5 minutes. Add remaining flour mixture and beat until dough is very soft.

Turn dough into a bowl that has been greased or sprayed with cooking spray; lightly grease or spray dough. Cover bowl with a damp cloth and let rise in a warm area until dough is doubled in size, about 1 hour.
Grease or spray an oblong baking sheet with cooking spray.

Punch the risen dough down and turn onto a well floured work surface; knead until dough is smooth and easy to handle, 1 to 2 minutes. Roll dough into a 10x12-inch rectangle and brush top with melted butter. Sprinkle cinnamon, brown sugar, pecans, and currants, respectively, onto the butter layer. Roll dough, beginning with long side, around filling in a jelly roll fashion and pinch the other side onto the roll to seal. Cut roll into 12 slices.
Arrange rolls, cut-side up, on the prepared baking sheet. Cover with a towel and let rise until nearly doubled in size, 30 to 45 minutes.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Remove towel from rolls and bake rolls in the preheated oven until golden, about 20 minutes.

Beat cream cheese and 1/2 cup butter together in a bowl using an electric mixer until smooth; beat in confectioners' sugar and vanilla extract until icing is fluffy and smooth. Spread icing on pumpkin rolls.
